creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
I was not able to reproduce it, as I always compile in a clean environment with poudriere.
If you compile in a dirty environment and having rust installed, the problem get visibile.

I will work on a new version that switch now completely to rust as a compiler.
That should then also fix the problem if you compile without poudriere and having rust installed (just as information).

The new gitlab 16.7 version will fix this.
